headline: UPDATED TIMING: Otis CFO to Speak at J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) Executive Vice President and CFO Cristina Méndez will participate in a fireside chat at the Industrials Conference hosted by J.P. Morgan on Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 1:35 p.m. ET. The presentation will be broadcast live at www.otis.com.
